changes: Collapsed multi-line path builder to single line (systemd_user_dir)
Extracted inline format! calls into intermediate variables (log_file, err_file)
Reformatted eprintln! macro arguments across multiple lines
Wrapped chained method calls (parent().unwrap_or()) for readability
Broke current_exe() chain and replace() call across lines

patterns_discovered.name: Clippy Line Length Enforcement
patterns_discovered.description: Multiple long expressions split across lines to comply with line length limits

patterns_discovered.name: Variable Extraction for Clarity
patterns_discovered.description: Complex format! expressions extracted to intermediate variables rather than inlined

patterns_discovered.name: Method Chain Breaking
patterns_discovered.description: Long method chains broken across multiple lines with proper indentation

gotchas_discovered.description: All changes are style/formatting only - no logic changes, making diffs large for minimal impact
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Separate formatting commits from feature commits in future work

gotchas_discovered.description: systemd_user_dir() collapsed to one line while other functions expanded - may indicate formatter configuration tuning
gotchas_discovered.observation: Suggests clippy/rustfmt configuration was adjusted between changes

actions_taken: Ran make check (tests, clippy, fmt verification)
approach_outcome.result: All code style and formatting issues resolved
